visuals.title: OS Debugging Techniques
visuals.description: Diagram showing the four main debugging approaches: failure analysis, performance monitoring, tracing, and profiling

diagrams.title: Debugging Workflow
steps: Check log files (/var/log/) for error messages
If crash: analyze core dump with gdb
If performance issue: use top, vmstat, iostat to identify bottleneck
Use strace/ltrace to trace system/library calls
Use profiling tools to find hotspots
Apply fix and verify with re-testing
diagrams.notes: Always start with log files -- they often contain the most direct clues about what went wrong.
